generated_oml:
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor-mounted position encoder for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox-mounted position encoder for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxMountedEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor position data from motor-mounted encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox position data from gearbox-mounted encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data from dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the digital twin"
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation model execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentification, MotionAccuracyEnhancement
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
]

instance AAS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for metadata management"
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for operational monitoring and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance AASMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata management of the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AAS
]

instance FrictionModelIdentification : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction model identification using white-box and black-box approaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of simulated vs measured data for operational monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCompensationAction
]

instance FrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into friction dynamics for control parameter optimization"
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for operational monitoring and decision support"
]

instance FrictionCompensationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Friction compensation for motion accuracy enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SINUMERIK840Dsl : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor generating torque output for the first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel in the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SINUMERIK840Dsl, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorMountedEncoder, GearboxMountedEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time continuous data streaming and model identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components following Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM), including data traces, processing components (simulation models), engineering models (SysML), and asset (robot axis) for unified data integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated stage during active robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data against reference measurements; friction model calibration using deviation analysis."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data exchange."
]
